# Wife To Be — Chester & Cheshire's Designer Wedding Dress Boutique

> Wife To Be is a family-run designer wedding dress boutique with over 20 years of experience, serving brides across Chester and the wider Cheshire region. As an official stockist of leading designers (Sophia Tolli, Veni Infantino, Phoenix Gowns, and White Rose & White Rose Plus), we offer 200+ designer wedding gowns, bridesmaid & prom dresses, and men's wedding suit hire. We give every bride a private, one-to-one, no-pressure styling experience from our two Cheshire boutiques in Warrington and Runcorn.

Wife To Be operates two boutiques: the main **Warrington** store (wedding dresses, 200+ gowns) and the **Runcorn** store (men's suit hire, by appointment). Our motto: *"More Than Just A Bridal Shop — Elegant, Sophisticated, Class."* Each appointment is dedicated to one bride at a time. Primary call to action: **Book an Appointment** by emailing thegroupuk@yahoo.com or calling 01925 570093.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://wifetobe.org/): The boutique, our designers, the experience, reviews and how to book — focused on Chester & Cheshire.
- [Wedding Dresses / Bridal Collections](https://wifetobe.org/bridal-collections.html): Designer gowns from Sophia Tolli, Veni Infantino, Phoenix Gowns and White Rose & White Rose Plus, plus bridesmaid and prom dresses.
- [Men's Formal Wear & Suit Hire](https://wifetobe.org/mens-formal-wear.html): Wedding suit hire for grooms, groomsmen, fathers and prom — based at the Runcorn boutique.
- [About Us](https://wifetobe.org/about.html): Our 20+ year story, our values and why brides choose us.
- [Our Brides (Reviews)](https://wifetobe.org/brides.html): Five-star reviews from real brides across the region.
- [Found The Dress](https://wifetobe.org/found-the-dress.html): What to expect at a private appointment, plus friendly tips.
- [Our Boutiques](https://wifetobe.org/boutiques.html): Addresses, opening hours and maps for the Warrington and Runcorn stores.
- [Contact & Book](https://wifetobe.org/contact.html): Booking form, phone numbers, email and locations.

## Local Area Pages
- [Wedding Dresses Wigan](https://wifetobe.org/wigan.html): Designer bridal for Wigan brides, 25–30 minutes down the M6.
- [Wedding Dresses Frodsham](https://wifetobe.org/frodsham.html): Designer gowns plus men's suit hire, with the Runcorn store just minutes away.
- [Wedding Dresses Newton-le-Willows](https://wifetobe.org/newton-le-willows.html): Designer bridal for Newton-le-Willows brides, around 15 minutes away.
- [Wedding Dresses Bolton](https://wifetobe.org/bolton.html): Designer bridal for Bolton brides, an easy run down the M61.

## Designers (Official Stockist)
- Sophia Tolli: Softly romantic silhouettes, delicate lacework and beautifully engineered bodices.
- Veni Infantino: Considered, contemporary statement gowns in luxurious fabrics.
- Phoenix Gowns: Classic, expertly tailored dresses with adaptable, customisable details.
- White Rose & White Rose Plus: Beautifully made gowns including a dedicated plus-size range to flatter every figure.

## Locations
- Warrington Boutique (primary, wedding dresses): 3-5 Fennel Street, Warrington, WA1 2PA. Tel: 01925 570093. Hours: Tue–Fri 11:00–17:00, Sat 10:00–17:00.
- Runcorn Boutique (men's suit hire, by appointment): 136 Greenway Road, Runcorn, WA7 5BS. Tel: 0151 420 0151.

## Services
- Designer wedding dress sales and styling (200+ gowns in store)
- Bridesmaid dresses
- Prom dresses
- Men's wedding suit hire (tuxedos, three-piece, morning suits, groomsmen, prom)
- In-house fittings, alterations guidance and one-to-one expert styling

## Contact
- Email: thegroupuk@yahoo.com
- Phone (Warrington): 01925 570093
- Phone (Runcorn): 0151 420 0151
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wifetobebridalandprom/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wifetobewarrington/
- Areas served: Chester & Cheshire (primary), Wigan, Frodsham, Newton-le-Willows, Bolton, plus Warrington and Runcorn.
